violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wooden base for the ice machine is bare wood and not a cleanable surface.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. The door closer for the bathroom by the dish area was disconnected. This results in the door not self closing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The paint is coming off the concrete floor in the dish area and food area. This is exposing bare concrete.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. The dish area was not separated from a garage area owned by a different person for the storage of cars and equipment.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. Mixing utensils were stored in a cup of plain, non-flowing water.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. The drain line for the ice bin hopper was running to a bucket/pitcher on the floor and not to a drain.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. The hose for the ice machine was in a pitcher that had water past the inlet for the hose. This did not have back flow prevention.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
